title: Vanilla X
description: Vanilla X is a perfect addition for vanilla Minecraft, giving it a new look
body:
![.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0ddafd4b3002560e295d0236cc1a37b3fb6af937.jpeg)

### (Spanish)
Vanilla X, el modpack ideal para aquellos jugadores que aman la experiencia vanilla de minecraft pero tambien les gusta añadir mods para que minecraft se vea mejor en muchos acpectos. 

Como en las texturas, optimizacion para una experiencia de juego fluida, construir con herramientas de construccion y más

### (English)
Vanilla X, the ideal modpack for players who love the vanilla Minecraft experience but also enjoy adding mods to enhance Minecraft in many ways.

As with textures, optimization for a smoother gameplay experience, building with construction tools, and more.

# Features

- ✔️ Better optimization (with Sodium) 

- ✔️ Better and updated structural design (Dungeons and taverns mod)

- ✔️ Building tools (Axiom Mod)

- ✔️ Integrated shaders (Complementary Shaders)

- ✔️ Dynamic light

- ✔️ Improved render distance (with Voxy)

- ✔️ Addition of new food (with the Farmer's Delight)

- ✔️ Xaero´s Minimap for adventures

- ✔️ New mechanics (Mouse Tweaks, Gamma utils, MiniHUD)

➕ 70+ Mods included

➕ 10+ Resource Packs included
